title: hieracium pilosum subsp. villosiceps
intro: Hieracium pilosum subsp. villosiceps is a subspecies of the hairy hawkweed plant, a member of the dandelion family, native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium pilosum subsp. villosiceps include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
